rules.specExclusivity: Only one spec tree (Sanguine/Accursed/Eternal/Fleshweaver-equivalent) can be active at a time in-game. You commit to ONE non-Class tree and spend your full Talent Essence budget within it (plus the separate Class tree spent with Ability Essence). Treat trees other than 'Class' as mutually exclusive choices, not a blend.
rules.partialRanksCount: A node only needs 1 point invested (not maxPoints) to count as 'connected' for prerequisite checks and to contribute toward the reqTreeAbilityEssence/reqTreeTalentEssence row-unlock thresholds.
rules.budgetCurrencies: Ability Essence (AE) is spent only in the Class tree. Talent Essence (TE) is spent only in whichever single spec tree you commit to. A node's abilityEssenceCost/talentEssenceCost fields show which currency it draws from (never both).
rules.rowGating: reqTreeAbilityEssence / reqTreeTalentEssence on a node is the minimum essence already spent within that SAME tree required to unlock it - not total across trees.
rules.levelGates: Some nodes (mostly entryType Ability) cost 0 essence and unlock automatically at requiredLevel instead of being a budget choice.
rules.prerequisiteFieldsCorrected: 'prerequisites' is the OR-logic grid-connection requirement (matches tooltip 'requires one connected node: A or B or C') - need at least 1 point in ANY ONE listed node. 'specialRequirement' is a separate, rare, AND-logic hard requirement used only by a handful of free/level-gated bonus nodes - ALL listed nodes must already have a point.
rules.budgetTotalsAssumed: Verified live for Bloodmage: 26 Ability Essence (Class tree) / 25 Talent Essence (spec tree) as the spendable caps. Assumed identical for all classes since this is tied to character leveling, not class design - not independently verified per class. Override in the toolkit if a specific class differs.
rules.referencedTerms: Extracted from colored in-line spans in the raw tooltip HTML (e.g. a description that highlights 'Cursed Blood' or 'Bloodbolt'). These are explicit developer-authored callouts to another spell/buff/mechanic name, and are the strongest available signal for detecting mechanical synergy between talents - stronger than plain keyword text matching.

talents.name: Facemelter

Requires Spider Form
Consumes Brood Marks
Spray poison upon an enemy and nearby enemies, dealing Nature damage over 15 seconds.
 1 Mark: 88 + 93.75% nature SP Nature damage.
 2 Marks: 112 + 120% nature SP Nature damage.
 3 Marks: 144 + 153.75% nature SP Nature damage.
 4 Marks: 182 + 195% nature SP Nature damage.
 5 Marks: 245 + 262.5% nature SP Nature damage.

rankDescriptions.description: Your Serpent's Fang now refreshes a charge of Alkahest.

talents.name: Lifemender
talents.description: Your Serpent's Fang now heals up to 5 additional nearby allies and Alkahest now heals an additional nearby target.

rankDescriptions.description: Your Serpent's Fang now heals up to 5 additional nearby allies and Alkahest now heals an additional nearby target.

talents.name: Venomcult Scrolls
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Green Salve by -2 sec and increases the healing done at the end of the duration by 50%.

rankDescriptions.description: Reduces the cooldown of Green Salve by -2 sec and increases the healing done at the end of the duration by 50%.

talents.name: Book of Shadra
talents.description:
Doubles the duration, cooldown, and healing of Green Salve.

In addition, it now seeks another nearby ally to heal every 6 sec, instead of at the end of the duration.

rankDescriptions.description:
Doubles the duration, cooldown, and healing of Green Salve.

In addition, it now seeks another nearby ally to heal every 6 sec, instead of at the end of the duration.

talents.name: Vizier Form
talents.description: $bb

rankDescriptions.description: $bc

talents.name: Spirit of the Jungle
talents.description: Increases the proc chance of Rejuvenating Venom by 10%.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases the proc chance of Rejuvenating Venom by 10%.

talents.name: Worship
talents.description: Allows all critical heals to increase periodic healing the target receives from you by 10% for 5 seconds.

rankDescriptions.description: Allows all critical heals to increase periodic healing the target receives from you by 10% for 5 seconds.

talents.name: Mycelial Replenishment
talents.description:
Increases your critical strike chance and critical healing done by 20% for 20 seconds and instantly restore 30% of your maximum mana, but consumes all stacks of Mycelial Healing on all nearby allies.

While active, all periodic critical strikes heal for an additional 20% of the healing done.

rankDescriptions.description:
Increases your critical strike chance and critical healing done by 20% for 20 seconds and instantly restore 30% of your maximum mana, but consumes all stacks of Mycelial Healing on all nearby allies.

While active, all periodic critical strikes heal for an additional 20% of the healing done.

talents.name: Sage
talents.description: Direct healing done by Alkahest now spreads an active Shadra's Balm from the primary target to a nearby ally.

rankDescriptions.description: Direct healing done by Alkahest now spreads an active Shadra's Balm from the primary target to a nearby ally.

talents.name: Bountiful Gifts
talents.description: Increases the healing of Shadra's Prayer, Green Salve, and Alkahest by 10%.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases the healing of Shadra's Prayer, Green Salve, and Alkahest by 10%.
Increases the healing of Shadra's Prayer, Green Salve, and Alkahest by 20%.

talents.name: Advisor's Perfidy
talents.description: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Serpent's Fang, Mending Mist, and Shadra's Balm by 15%.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Serpent's Fang, Mending Mist, and Shadra's Balm by 15%.
Increases the bonus healing scaling of Serpent's Fang, Mending Mist, and Shadra's Balm by 30%.

talents.name: Toxic Communion
talents.description: Extend the duration of Shadra's Balm and Mending Mist by 15 sec on all allies within 30 yds.

rankDescriptions.description: Extend the duration of Shadra's Balm and Mending Mist by 15 sec on all allies within 30 yds.

talents.name: Shadra's Presence
talents.description:
Allies within 100 yds receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Antivenom now dispels 1 additional effect.

rankDescriptions.description:
Allies within 100 yds receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Antivenom now dispels 1 additional effect.

talents.name: Blight Antidote
talents.description: Inject an ally with a powerful magic antidote, dispelling 2 curse effects from them.

rankDescriptions.description: Inject an ally with a powerful magic antidote, dispelling 2 curse effects from them.

talents.name: Widow's Watch
talents.description: Allies affected by Shadra's Balm now have a 20% increased chance to resist poison and curse effects.

rankDescriptions.description: Allies affected by Shadra's Balm now have a 20% increased chance to resist poison and curse effects.

talents.name: Occultist
talents.description:
Level 40 Passive
Casting Green Salve or Serpent's Fang now has a 30% chance to refresh a charge of Alkahest.

rankDescriptions.description:
Level 40 Passive
Casting Green Salve or Serpent's Fang now has a 30% chance to refresh a charge of Alkahest.

talents.name: Ophidian Renewal
talents.description: Increases the duration of Shadra's Balm and Mending Mist and Shadra's Prayer by 3 sec.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases the duration of Shadra's Balm and Mending Mist and Shadra's Prayer by 3 sec.

talents.name: Extraction
talents.description: For 15 seconds, your Intellect and Spirit are doubled and all critical periodic healing done by you restores 5% of your missing mana.

rankDescriptions.description: For 15 seconds, your Intellect and Spirit are doubled and all critical periodic healing done by you restores 5% of your missing mana.

talents.name: Sublime Extraction
talents.description: Casting Green Salve now resets the cooldown of Serpent's Fang and removes the cost of your next Serpent's Fang for 8 seconds.

rankDescriptions.description: Casting Green Salve now resets the cooldown of Serpent's Fang and removes the cost of your next Serpent's Fang for 8 seconds.

talents.name: Venom Fanatic
talents.description: Your Serpent's Fang now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

rankDescriptions.description: Your Serpent's Fang now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

talents.name: Shadra's Aid
talents.description: Envelop an ally in Shadra's grace, reducing all damage taken by -20% and causing direct damage taken to restore 3% maximum health for 15 seconds.

rankDescriptions.description: Envelop an ally in Shadra's grace, reducing all damage taken by -20% and causing direct damage taken to restore 3% maximum health for 15 seconds.

talents.name: Venom Weaving
talents.description: Your Serpent's Fang now increases the healing of your next 2 Alkahests by 25%.

rankDescriptions.description: Your Serpent's Fang now increases the healing of your next 2 Alkahests by 25%.

talents.name: Serpent Lord's Amulet
talents.description: Draw power from the Serpent Lord's Amulet, increasing your spell haste by 20% and reduces your mana costs by -50% for 15 seconds.

rankDescriptions.description: Draw power from the Serpent Lord's Amulet, increasing your spell haste by 20% and reduces your mana costs by -50% for 15 seconds.

talents.name: Ritual Healing
talents.description:
Level 50 Passive
Every 9 sec, your Shadra's Prayer will now restore 1% of the target's maximum mana, 8 Energy or Focus, 4 Rage and 4 Runic Power.

rankDescriptions.description:
Level 50 Passive
Every 9 sec, your Shadra's Prayer will now restore 1% of the target's maximum mana, 8 Energy or Focus, 4 Rage and 4 Runic Power.

talents.name: Mycelial Synchronization
talents.description: Casting Shadra's Aid on an ally now also casts it on yourself.

rankDescriptions.description: Casting Shadra's Aid on an ally now also casts it on yourself.

talents.name: Cycle of Rebirth
talents.description: Effective periodic healing with Shadra's Balm now has a 10% chance to make your next Alkahest within 8 seconds is free and instant.

rankDescriptions.description: Effective periodic healing with Shadra's Balm now has a 10% chance to make your next Alkahest within 8 seconds is free and instant.

talents.name: Serpent Lord's Ritual
talents.description: Direct healing done now has a 5% chance to grant you 5 sec of Serpent Lord's Amulet.Serpent Lord's AmuletDraw power from the Serpent Lord's Amulet, increasing your spell haste by 20% and reduces your mana costs by -50% for 15 seconds.
